title: AWS Marketplace: Accenture AI / Agentic AI Enterprise Process Reinvention Services
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Accenture AI / Agentic AI Enterprise Process Reinvention Services
Info
Sold by: Accenture
An 8- to 18-week modular program designed for industry specific application and successful realization of business value powered by GenAI and Agentic Solutions on AWS.
Request private offer
Overview
Pricing
Legal
Support
Associated software
Overview
Try agent mode
Create proposal
Ask question
Accenture’s AI-focused process reinvention services provide a modular, phased program to help enterprise clients deliver business value leveraging AI and Agentic AI solutions on AWS.
This program complements deployment of AWS Marketplace-listed Agentic software, including AI Refinery, CCaaS, Spotlight and others to ensure outcomes including: lower costs of Agentic solution deployment, faster innovation via AWS Agentic services, and higher total value to the enterprise.
The program’s modular approach comprises three distinct phases and deliverables, including:
Phase 1 - Foundation (2 weeks to 4 weeks):
Enterprise readiness assessment
Technology evaluation and readiness / maturity assessment
Compliance, observability, responsibility, and security framework design
Operating model blueprint development
Initial business value estimation to support investment to move forward
Phase 2 - Automation Architecture (3 weeks to 6 weeks):
Process identification re-design and prioritization
Agent orchestration and framework design
Integration architecture development
Reusable component library creation
Detailed value estimation to support prioritisation and investment to move forward
Phase 3 - Implementation and Scale (3 weeks to 6 weeks):
Pilot deployment of agent-driven processes (est. one to five processes)
Automated testing, compliance, and responsibility framework implementation
People and Change deployment
Value realization deployment to support case to scale-up
Scale-up roadmap development
Highlights
Modular design allowing for industry / geo / customer specific customization; Built-in governance and compliance frameworks including consideration for Industry or Government mandated standards
Process re-design not process automation; Reusable patterns and accelerators deployed and harvested but implementations are customer specific; Processes are re-imagined ground up to fully benefit from the latest technical capabilities.
Integration with existing AWS enterprise systems and processes; Clear metrics for measuring success including ROI and managing risk.
Details
Sold by
Accenture
Categories
Implementation
Legal & Compliance
Generative AI
Delivery method
Professional services
Deployed on AWS
No
New

You can now purchase comprehensive solutions tailored to use cases and industries.
Learn more

Request private offer
Pricing is based on your specific requirements and eligibility. To get a custom quote for your needs, request a private offer.

Support
Vendor support
acn.apn@accenture.com
Software associated with this service
AI Refinery™
By Accenture
AI Refinery™ is an AI foundation platform, created by Accenture and built to leverage NVIDIA technology to help companies turn raw AI technology into useful business solutions.
o Agents - Build agents and create an autonomous network that works together to accomplish goals.
o Knowledge - Collect and organize enterprise data and knowledge to power AI applications and agents.
o Models - Customize pre-built foundation models using proprietary data, and flex between models based on key performance factors.
o Governance - Manage all AI components across an enterprise, with an eye on cost, accuracy, security, responsible use, and more.
Built for an era where AI defines new processes, workflows, and software, AI Refinery™ puts AI into the hands of an organization's entire workforce to continuously reinvent the highest value enterprise capabilities.
View product
Accenture Industrial Intelligence Suite
By Accenture
Industrial Intelligence Suite offers customized AI-powered Digital Assistants for specific use cases that help operations, production and quality teams manage day-to-day industrial operations and improve their decision making while managing large-scale, complex operations.
View product
